character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: Guarded stores at the blockhouse, joined the jolly-boat with arms and provisions.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: Led the jolly-boat crew, ordered crew members to follow, and risked his life to secure provisions.

character_dossiers.name: Abraham Gray
character_dossiers.biography: Joined the captain after a scuffle, assisted in securing the jolly-boat.

character_dossiers.name: Redruth
character_dossiers.biography: Part of the jolly-boat crew, assisted with steering and rowing.

character_dossiers.name: Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: Part of the overloaded jolly-boat crew, contributed to the provisioning effort.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: Led the jolly-boat crew, coordinated efforts to navigate against the tide.
